leak_scan.note: The meta-validator AST-scans every git-tracked *.py outside exclude_prefixes for a module-level dict carrying all declaration_fields. Every such declaration must be registered as a `python` surface below. An unregistered declaration is a gate failure: either a verified fact leaked a distrust declaration (the contract's cardinal error) or a new inference-layer surface was added without registering its consumer pairing. Excludes: plugins/ and mutants/ are derived/working mirrors validated elsewhere; tests/ construct expected-shape dicts as fixtures, not live surfaces.

surfaces.note: Pilot surface: lexical clone families. Consumer (quality) answers which families are intentional boilerplate vs extractable debt before treating the total as debt.

surfaces.consumer_anchor: doc families are intentional shared template
surfaces.note: nose Markdown near-duplicate families. Declaration rides only on the reported-families (ok) payload; tool-absence/version-too-old/error and baseline-written states are verified facts and stay clean.

surfaces.consumer_anchor: which heuristic hits are real ergonomic
surfaces.note: Ergonomics heuristics / subcheck_counts. Declaration gated on `if skills` (a no-measure state when unconfigured).

surfaces.consumer_anchor: test-file / nested-CLI growth paying for real isolation
surfaces.note: Test-economics trend. Declaration lives in the script wrapper (relocated from the lib during #322 to stay under the length warn band).
Suppression pressure. Declaration is defined in the lib and emitted by inventory_lint_ignores.py (the emitter only subscripts the imported dict, so it is not itself a declaration site).

surfaces.consumer_anchor: is a warn-band file an honest cohesive unit near its limit
surfaces.note: Length smell (warn band / --headroom near-limit) ONLY. The hard over-limit file gate is a verified fact and never carries the declaration (function length is gated separately by ruff PLR0915, a tool rule); this validator is file-granular and relies on the per-surface #322 tests for that intra-file boundary.

surfaces.consumer_anchor: does the top-ranked route actually fit THIS task and repo state
surfaces.note: Recommendation ranking. Declaration rides only when a ranking is produced (has_recommendations); the plain capability inventory is a verified fact and stays clean.

surfaces.consumer_anchor: standing cost THIS repo should budget or optimize
surfaces.note: Runtime hot-spot trend. Declaration rides only when hot spots exist.

surfaces.consumer_anchor: does the matched CI step actually re-run THIS gate's full proof
surfaces.note: CI-recoverability triage. Token-identity match of a costly local gate against CI run-steps is an inference, not proof; the consumer reference forces the operator to confirm the CI step truly re-runs the gate's full proof before moving it off the local hot path. Emitted by inventory_ci_recoverable_gates.py, which only subscripts the imported dict, so it is not itself a declaration site.

Duplicate discovery and broad scanner waste advisory. Token evidence surfaces candidate collection and broad AST parser patterns; the consumer must decide whether the candidate duplicates a real runner/target-list owner or whether broad parsing is the correctness boundary.

prose_anchors: the single highest-value next quality move
surfaces.note: Agent-authored `Recommended Next Quality Moves` prose ranking. No Python declaration dict exists, so it is registered as prose and checked by anchor presence (the 4 framing elements + the consumer-answer line). Out of the python leak scan by design; the declaration and consumer live in the same self-consuming doc.
